events.event_name: No AI capability event assigned to Wave 7 cross-domain bridge
events.event_description: This registry records that anx_us_2026w07_cross_domain_bridge is a non-event psychometric bridge wave for cross-domain linking among somatic_ambient_anxiety, economic_vocational_anxiety, and epistemic_trust_anxiety. It is intentionally not anchored to a frontier model release, capability demonstration, labor-market announcement, deepfake incident, misinformation incident, platform-policy change, regulatory action, public safety event, benchmark release, or any other time-localized AI event. The registry is locked so Wave 7 responses cannot later be retrofitted into an event-study exposure design after outcome inspection.
